name: Accountant
description: Financial record management, accounting analysis, and business financial services.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree; or C.P.A., C.A., C.G.A., or C.M.A. credential.

name: Architect
description: Architectural design, project planning, and construction oversight.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree; or state/provincial license.

name: Computer Systems Analyst
description: Analysis and design of IT systems, software, and technical computing infrastructure.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree; or post-secondary diploma or certificate and three years experience.

name: Disaster Relief Insurance Claims Adjuster
description: Evaluation and processing of insurance claims arising from disaster or catastrophic events.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree and disaster relief training; or three years claims adjustment experience plus disaster relief training. Must be employed by a Canadian or Mexican employer.

name: Economist
description: Economic data analysis, modeling, forecasting, and policy research.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree in Economics or a closely related field.

name: Engineer — Aerospace
description: Design, development, and testing of aircraft, spacecraft, missiles, and related systems and equipment.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree in Engineering; or state/provincial license. Qualifies under the 'Engineer' TN profession category.

name: Engineer — Agricultural
description: Application of engineering principles to agricultural production, processing, and storage systems.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree in Engineering; or state/provincial license. Qualifies under the 'Engineer' TN profession category.

name: Engineer — Biomedical
description: Application of engineering principles to biology and medicine for healthcare technologies and devices.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree in Engineering; or state/provincial license. Qualifies under the 'Engineer' TN profession category.

name: Engineer — Chemical
description: Design and optimization of processes and equipment for large-scale chemical manufacturing and production.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree in Engineering; or state/provincial license. Qualifies under the 'Engineer' TN profession category.

name: Engineer — Civil
description: Design, planning, and supervision of construction of infrastructure such as roads, bridges, buildings, and water systems.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree in Engineering; or state/provincial license. Qualifies under the 'Engineer' TN profession category.

name: Engineer — Computer
description: Design and development of computer hardware, embedded systems, and the hardware-software interface.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree in Engineering; or state/provincial license. Qualifies under the 'Engineer' TN profession category.

name: Engineer — Electrical
description: Design, development, and testing of electrical equipment, power systems, and components.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree in Engineering; or state/provincial license. Qualifies under the 'Engineer' TN profession category.

name: Engineer — Electronic
description: Design and development of electronic components, circuits, and communication systems.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree in Engineering; or state/provincial license. Qualifies under the 'Engineer' TN profession category.

name: Engineer — Environmental
description: Development of engineering solutions to environmental problems including pollution control, remediation, and sustainable systems.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree in Engineering; or state/provincial license. Qualifies under the 'Engineer' TN profession category.

name: Engineer — Industrial
description: Optimization of complex processes, systems, and organizations for efficiency and productivity.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree in Engineering; or state/provincial license. Qualifies under the 'Engineer' TN profession category.

name: Engineer — Mechanical
description: Design, development, and manufacturing of mechanical devices, machines, and thermal systems.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree in Engineering; or state/provincial license. Qualifies under the 'Engineer' TN profession category.

name: Engineer — Nuclear
description: Design and operation of nuclear equipment, reactors, and processes for energy production or research.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree in Engineering; or state/provincial license. Qualifies under the 'Engineer' TN profession category.

name: Engineer — Petroleum
description: Design of methods for extracting oil and gas from underground deposits safely and efficiently.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree in Engineering; or state/provincial license. Qualifies under the 'Engineer' TN profession category.

name: Engineer — Software
description: Design, development, and maintenance of software systems and applications using engineering principles.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree in Engineering; or state/provincial license. Qualifies under the 'Engineer' TN profession category.

name: Engineer — Structural
description: Analysis and design of structures to safely withstand loads, stresses, and environmental forces.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree in Engineering; or state/provincial license. Qualifies under the 'Engineer' TN profession category.

name: Forester / Sylviculturist
description: Forest management, conservation, timber production, and cultivation of forest resources.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree; or state/provincial license.

name: Graphic Designer
description: Visual communication, branding, layout, and graphic design for print and digital media.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree; or post-secondary diploma or certificate and three years experience.

name: Hotel Manager
description: Operations management of a hotel or restaurant facility, including staffing, finance, and guest services.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree in hotel/restaurant management; or post-secondary diploma or certificate and three years experience. Must be supervised by a professional.

name: Industrial Designer
description: Product design and development integrating aesthetic, functional, and manufacturing considerations.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree; or post-secondary diploma or certificate and three years experience.

name: Interior Designer
description: Planning and design of indoor spaces for aesthetics, function, and code compliance.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree; or post-secondary diploma or certificate and three years experience.

name: Land Surveyor
description: Measurement and mapping of land boundaries, topography, and property lines.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree; or state/provincial/federal license.

name: Landscape Architect
description: Outdoor and environmental space planning, site design, and landscape development.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree.

name: Lawyer / Attorney
description: Legal representation, counsel, and advisory services. Includes Notaries in Quebec.
requirements: LL.B., J.D., LL.L., B.C.L., or Licenciatura degree (five years); or membership in a state/provincial bar.

name: Librarian
description: Library administration, information resource management, and research support services.
requirements: M.L.S. or B.L.S., for which another Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree was a prerequisite.

name: Management Consultant
description: Organizational strategy, process improvement, and business advisory services.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree; or five years experience as a management consultant, or five years experience in a specialty related to the consulting agreement.

name: Mathematician
description: Mathematical research, theoretical analysis, and applied problem solving.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree.

name: Research Assistant (Post-Secondary)
description: Support for academic or applied research at a university or post-secondary institution.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree.

name: Scientific Technician / Technologist
description: Technical laboratory and field support in scientific disciplines including agriculture, astronomy, biology, chemistry, engineering, forestry, geology, geophysics, meteorology, or physics.
requirements: Theoretical knowledge in one of the following fields: agriculture, astronomy, biology, chemistry, engineering, forestry, geology, geophysics, meteorology, or physics; and must be able to solve practical problems in that discipline. Post-secondary diploma or certificate with relevant experience typically required.

name: Social Worker
description: Client support, case management, counseling, and community social services.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree.

name: Statistician
description: Statistical data analysis, modeling, interpretation, and research design.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree.

name: Technical Publications Writer
description: Creation of technical documentation, manuals, guides, and written communications for technical products or services.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree; or post-secondary diploma or certificate and three years experience.

name: Urban Planner / Geographer
description: City and regional planning, land use policy, spatial analysis, and geographic research.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree.

name: Vocational Counselor
description: Career guidance, job placement assistance, and vocational training support.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree.

name: Dentist
description: Oral health care, dental treatment, preventive dentistry, and oral surgery.
requirements: D.D.S., D.M.D., Doctor en Odontologia, or Doctor en Cirugia Dental; or state/provincial license.

name: Dietitian
description: Nutritional assessment, clinical diet planning, and dietary counseling for individuals and groups.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree; or state/provincial license.

name: Medical Laboratory Technologist
description: Laboratory specimen analysis, diagnostic testing, and clinical lab procedures.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree; or post-secondary diploma or certificate and three years experience. VisaScreen certificate required for Mexicans entering the United States.

name: Nutritionist
description: Food and dietary guidance, nutrition education, and counseling for health promotion.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree.

name: Occupational Therapist
description: Rehabilitation through therapeutic activities to improve patients' ability to perform daily living and work tasks.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree; or state/provincial license.

name: Pharmacist
description: Medication dispensing, pharmaceutical counseling, drug interaction review, and pharmacy management.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree; or state/provincial license.

name: Physical Therapist / Physiotherapist
description: Physical rehabilitation, movement therapy, pain management, and injury recovery.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree; or state/provincial license.

name: Physician (Teaching or Research Only)
description: Medical instruction at a university or research institution. Clinical patient care is not permitted under this TN category.
requirements: M.D. or Doctor en Medicina; or state/provincial license. Strictly limited to teaching or research roles — no clinical practice.

name: Psychologist
description: Psychological assessment, diagnosis, treatment, and mental health counseling.
requirements: State/provincial license; or Licenciatura degree.

name: Recreational Therapist
description: Therapeutic recreation programming and activity facilitation to improve patient health and well-being.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree.

name: Registered Nurse
description: Patient care, clinical nursing, health monitoring, and coordination of medical treatment.
requirements: State/provincial license; or Licenciatura degree in nursing. VisaScreen certificate required for Mexicans entering the United States.

name: Veterinarian
description: Veterinary medicine, animal surgery, diagnostics, and animal health care.
requirements: D.V.M., D.M.V., or Doctor en Veterinaria; or state/provincial license.

name: Agriculturist / Agronomist
description: Agricultural research, crop management, soil science application, and farm systems optimization.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree.

name: Animal Breeder
description: Genetic selection and structured breeding programs to improve livestock and animal traits.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree.

name: Animal Scientist
description: Research on animal biology, nutrition, reproduction, and production systems.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree.

name: Apiculturist
description: Honeybee colony management, apiary science, pollination research, and honey production.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree.

name: Astronomer
description: Celestial observation, space science research, astrophysics, and cosmological study.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree.

name: Biochemist / Biophysicist
description: Research on the chemical and physical processes within and related to living organisms.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree.

name: Biologist
description: Study of living organisms, ecosystems, cellular processes, and biological phenomena.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree.

name: Chemist
description: Research and analysis of chemical compounds, reactions, properties, and materials.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree.

name: Dairy Scientist
description: Research on dairy production systems, milk quality, herd management, and dairy processing.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree.

name: Entomologist
description: Study of insects, their behavior, ecology, physiology, and management strategies.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree.

name: Epidemiologist
description: Investigation and analysis of disease patterns, public health outbreaks, and population health risks.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree.

name: Geneticist
description: Research on heredity, gene expression, genetic variation, and genomic science.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree.

name: Geochemist
description: Study of the chemical composition and processes of the Earth, including rocks, soils, and water systems.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree.

name: Geologist
description: Earth science research including study of rock formations, geological history, and subsurface structures.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree.

name: Geophysicist
description: Application of physics to Earth systems including seismology, geomagnetism, and gravity. Includes Oceanographer in the Mexico/US context.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree.

name: Horticulturist
description: Plant cultivation science, garden and orchard management, and landscape botany research.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree.

name: Meteorologist
description: Atmospheric science research, weather forecasting, and climate analysis.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree.

name: Pharmacologist
description: Research on drug effects, mechanisms of action, pharmacokinetics, and drug-biological interactions.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree.

name: Physicist
description: Research on matter, energy, and fundamental physical laws. Includes Oceanographer in the Canada context.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree.

name: Plant Breeder
description: Crop genetic improvement, plant variety development, and applied plant genetics.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree.

name: Poultry Scientist
description: Research on poultry production systems, avian nutrition, genetics, and flock management.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree.

name: Range Manager / Conservationist
description: Management and conservation of grassland, rangeland, and natural range resources.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree.

name: Soil Scientist
description: Research on soil composition, physical and chemical properties, and land management.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree.

name: Zoologist / Wildlife Biologist
description: Study of animal species, wildlife ecology, behavior, and conservation biology.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree.

name: College Teacher
description: Instruction and academic teaching at a college or post-secondary institution.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree.

name: Seminary Teacher
description: Religious and theological instruction at a seminary or divinity school.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree.

name: University Teacher
description: Instruction and/or research at a university or higher education institution.
requirements: Baccalaureate or Licenciatura degree.
